en.value:
Preparations and PA Submission to SWC and MoWCSW (agreements, recruitments)

	B. SWC /Ministrv Approval process etc

	c. Activity Component:1 Disaster Risk Reduction Activities

	
		Structural and non-structural mitigation and river bank
	
		protection schemes/works
	
		Boats support for rescue and relief during disaster
	
		Provision of rescue materials at district level
	
		Establishment of early warning systems and its operation
	
		Establishment of emergency relief matching funds at VDC levels
	
		Establishment of farmers field school
	
		Inputs support to disaster affected HHs (seeds, fertilizer, technical support)
	
		Pre-monsoon orientation workshops in 4 VDCs
	
		Community Based Disaster Risk Management trainings/refresher for DMCs
	
		Damage Needs Assessment trainings for new area
	
		Contingency plan workshop /follow up in field
	
		Mock drills (search and rescue) training for preparedness to disasters
	
		Strengthen institutions/networks of disaster affected communities in targeted VDCs
	
		District govt. stakeholders joint field visit
	
		District level DRR related workshop
	
		Best practice publications and dissemination
	
		 Activity Component-2: Safe Migration
	
		Information booth in International Airport
	
		Pre-employment orientation training to potential  migrants workers
	
		Legal supports (Para legal services, counseling,


	. ~._ ­

	Referral and documentation & monitoring services)

	
		Hotline services and referral services for survivors (victimized migrant workers)
	
		Radio programmes for mass awareness and advocacy-52 episodes from Radio Nepal FM
	
		Develop various IEC materials ( posters, leaflets etc) for mass awareness-10,000 copies
	
		Institutional Supports to 15 returnee migrants Networks
	
		Formation and strengthening of and support to new radio listeners clubs
	
		Observing International Migrants day-National level interactions on Migration issues
	
		Media mobilization (Press conference etc) on migrations issues
	
		Sensitization workshops with embassy, and ministry officials
	
		Programme Monitoring and Field visits by DCA and partners
	
		Programme Review and Coordination Meetings (CPAC, DPAC,)
	
		Project Partners' Coordination & Review Meetings (DCA-partners meetings and partners platforms meetings etc)
	
		Programme Reporting (six monthly and annual)
	
		Project Evaluation and evaluation report finalization and submission

en.full: Integrated Disaster Risk Reduction, and Safe Migration Programmes in Nepal (Second phase)

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
